# Musharraf Kazi — Complete Profile

> AI Engineer, AI Systems Architect, AI-Native Full-Stack Developer, Indie Builder, AI Automation Consultant

## Identity

- Full Name: Musharraf Ateeque Kazi
- Also Known As: Kazi Musharraf, MK Knight, mk-knight23, mk.knight970
- Location: India
- Website: https://mkazi.live
- GitHub: https://github.com/mk-knight23
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/musharraf-kazi
- Email: kazi@reprime.com

## Professional Summary

Musharraf Kazi is an AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer who builds production AI systems, developer tools, and SaaS products. His work spans agentic AI architectures, multi-model routing, real-time dashboards, and client-facing web applications. He has shipped 60+ projects and specializes in turning AI capabilities into working products.

## Technical Skills

### AI & Machine Learning
- Large Language Model Integration (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Groq, Ollama)
- Multi-LLM Routing and Orchestration
- Agentic AI Systems (Tool Calling, Agent Memory, Multi-Agent Workflows)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Vector Databases and Embeddings (pgvector, Pinecone)
- AI SDKs: Anthropic SDK, OpenAI SDK, Vercel AI SDK, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI

### Frontend Development
- React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Angular, Svelte, Astro, Remix
- TypeScript, JavaScript
- Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Three.js, Framer Motion, GSAP
- Design Systems and Component Libraries
- Responsive Design and Accessibility

### Backend Development
- Node.js, Express, Fastify
- Python, FastAPI, Django, Flask
- REST APIs, GraphQL, WebSockets
- Authentication and Authorization
- Background Jobs and Queues
- Serverless Functions

### Data & Infrastructure
- PostgreSQL, Supabase, Firebase, SQLite
- Prisma ORM
- Docker, GitHub Actions
- Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, Railway, AWS
- CI/CD Pipelines

## Portfolio Sections

This portfolio is organized into five specialized views that rotate on mkazi.live:

1. **DevTools & AI** — AI developer tools, CLI utilities, SDK integrations, multi-model routing systems
2. **Full-Stack Products** — End-to-end SaaS applications, dashboards, command centers, CRM integrations
3. **Frontend Engineering** — Motion design, UI/UX craft, design systems, Three.js experiences, component libraries
4. **Backend Systems** — APIs, databases, infrastructure, scalability, authentication, data pipelines
5. **AI Frontend** — AI-powered interfaces, LLM integration UIs, agent-driven user experiences, chat interfaces

## Key Projects

- Multi-LLM Router: Intelligent routing across Claude, GPT, Gemini with cost optimization
- AI Command Center: Real-time dashboard integrating Gmail, WhatsApp, Calendar, AI Assistant
- Developer Tool Suite: QuizFlow, VaultPass, VoiceKit, VisualVault, GitFlow
- Client Websites: Roofing companies, barber schools, real estate platforms
- Data Platform: Multi-source economic data aggregation with 22-source search
